name: Changxin Health Care Industry Alloc(LOF)
summary: Changxin Health Care Industry Alloc(LOF) is a fund that focuses on investing in the healthcare industry and is listed as an Open-Ended Fund (LOF). The fund aims to achieve long-term capital appreciation by identifying and investing in companies with strong growth potential in the healthcare sector. It is managed by Changxin Asset Management Corporation Ltd., based in China.
